indicators.name: hard industrial surfaces
indicators.rationale: The hard industrial surfaces, such as the bar top and the floor, are not suitable for sleeping.

indicators.name: open commercial layout
indicators.rationale: The open commercial layout with large windows and a view of the city does not provide privacy or acoustic enclosure for sleep.

indicators.name: no bed or resting surface
indicators.rationale: There is no bed or other resting surface present in the image.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is not suitable for primary sleep. The hard industrial surfaces, open commercial layout, and lack of a bed or resting surface make it unsuitable for sleeping.
